posts.text:
Congratulations!


Eddie Stainer (@Eddie_Stainer)

I know many won’t care, but it matters to me. 1,389 days sober today.

Because I know what the other side looks like.

Hospitals.
Handcuffs.
Seizures.
Overdoses.
Secure mental health units.

Nights where my own mind
was trying to destroy me.





— https://nitter.net/Eddie_Stainer/status/2031470546320503251#m

posts.text:
Fulton County Residents, what ya'll say??????


Everything Georgia (@GAFollowers)

A controversial former Illinois mayor, who faced iA former Illinois mayor, Tiffany Henyard, has moved to Atlanta and is running for the Fulton County Commission. 

She left her mayoral post after controversies and investigations over her spending and leadership.





— https://nitter.net/GAFollowers/status/2031731872917504360#m

posts.text:
Billy Carson explains how plants and trees may communicate with us and how a device can make those signals audible.

Are we more connected than we realize? What do you think?
